name: io.github.namjeongwan/suparch
title: Suparch
description: An open-source MCP server for searching, comparing, and calculating supplement facts.

environmentVariables.name: SUPARCH_CATALOG_URL
environmentVariables.description: HTTPS URL of a published Suparch SQLite catalog snapshot.

environmentVariables.name: SUPARCH_CATALOG_SHA256
environmentVariables.description: Expected SHA-256 for the catalog snapshot.
